name: qiraat-ayah-map
description: Open dataset mapping Quran ayah numbers between the six canonical counting systems used by the ten Qiraat.

scripts.generate: node scripts/sync-rawi-metadata.mjs && node scripts/generate-mappings.mjs && node scripts/normalize-forward-mappings.mjs && node scripts/generate-reverse-mappings.mjs && node scripts/generate-boundary-events.mjs && node scripts/generate-differences-reconciliation.mjs && node scripts/generate-classical-count-attestations.mjs
